FADPORT

MyKHAS

Türkçe

We held our panel titled “Artificial Intelligence in Design,” organized by Kadir Has University’s Faculty of Art and Design, on Friday, May 24, 2024. We would like to thank all our participants for creating a productive and enjoyable discussion environment.

We look forward to seeing you at our upcoming events, where we will continue to discuss the role of artificial intelligence tools in design.
